name: Bonnie Adult Cat Food Pouch - Liver Chunks in Gravy 85g
description: Bonnie Adult Cat Food Pouch - Liver Chunks in Gravy , fully-balanced, liver protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 4.5 Crude Fiber (%) -0.4 Moisture (%) -84 Crude Ash (%) - 2.2 Vitamin E (Min) - 100 mg/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) - 300 IU/kg Copper -2 mg/kg Manganese -2 mg/kg Zinc - 10 mg/kg Biotin - 20 g/kg Taurine - 1000 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (liver 4%), minerals, inulin (0.1%).
